title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images representing different cities in China: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image reflects a specific viewpoint from a car, indicating a distinct characteristic of the city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide presents the theme of the presentation, focusing on China's evolution. It portrays images of taxis and cityscapes, suggesting a journey through different aspects of Chinese culture and development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session encourages investigation and research into city development. It identifies key elements such as local features, development strategies, and the outcomes and positive impact on cities.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide matches Chinese cities to their development strategies. Beijing is linked with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide illustrates development strategies of cities as seen from the perspective of taxi drivers. It emphasizes how cities leverage local features to promote unique growth, reflecting an evolving nation with specific strategies.
